name: John Garamendi
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $321,027 for John Garamendi in U.S. House, CA-08. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
